reviews.feedback: Missing 500 error documentation even though source code has catch blocks returning 500. Need to document all error paths including server errors.
Very minimal output. No tables, no examples, no OpenAPI spec.
Good overall but OpenAPI global security should reference bearerAuth as optional, not empty array.
Missing rate limiting entirely. No curl examples. No response schemas.
Error format section is good but need error examples on every endpoint, not just some. Also missing 429 and 500 on individual endpoints.
Missed the details field in error schema. No Zod constraints reflected. No OpenAPI output.
